_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: Teamspeak 6 Manager
author: snxrcsme@gmail.com
description: Web-based management interface for TeamSpeak 6 servers by clusterzx. Ships as a pre-built GHCR image (ghcr.io/snxrcs/ts6-manager) that contains the React frontend, Express backend, and Go WebRTC sidecar. No build step on the Pelican server - the image is pulled and run directly. Default TeamSpeak connection can be seeded from the variables below so users don't have to configure it in the UI.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# TS6-Manager Pelican install script (thin variant).
# All heavy lifting is done by the pre-built GHCR image
# (ghcr.io/snxrcs/ts6-manager). This script only ensures
# persistent directories exist.

set -e
echo "=== TS6-Manager (prebuilt image) install: start ==="
date -u

TARGET="/mnt/server"
mkdir -p "${TARGET}/data/music"

# Nothing else to do. .env is generated on first boot by /app/start.sh.
echo "[install] Data dirs ready. Start-up files live inside the image at /app/."
echo "[install] The runtime image will auto-generate .env on first boot."
echo "=== TS6-Manager install: done ==="
date -u

variables.name: Backend Port
variables.description: Internal port the Node.js backend listens on. Stays inside the container, not publicly reachable.

variables.name: Sidecar Port
variables.description: Internal port the Go WebRTC sidecar listens on. Stays inside the container.

variables.name: Frontend URL (CORS origin)
variables.description: Public URL users will open in their browser. Used as CORS origin on the backend. Example: https://ts6.example.com. Leave empty to default to http://SERVER_IP:SERVER_PORT.

variables.name: TS Server Name
variables.description: Display name for the default TeamSpeak connection that will be pre-seeded into the UI. Only used on first boot.

variables.name: TS Host
variables.description: Hostname or IP of your TeamSpeak server. Example: 127.0.0.1 if it runs on the same node, or a public IP/domain.

variables.name: TS WebQuery Port
variables.description: HTTP WebQuery port of your TeamSpeak server (NOT the classic ServerQuery 10011). Default on TS6: 10080.

variables.name: TS API Key
variables.description: WebQuery API key (generated via apikeyadd in the TS server). If left empty, no connection is seeded and the user has to add one via the UI. If set, this connection is auto-created on first boot.

variables.name: TS Use HTTPS
variables.description: Whether the WebQuery uses HTTPS (TLS). Default: false. Set to true if your TS server has HTTPS enabled.

variables.name: Allow Self-Signed TS Certs
variables.description: Allow self-signed certificates for WebQuery HTTPS. Default: false.

variables.name: TS SSH Port
variables.description: SSH ServerQuery port of your TeamSpeak server (only used for event-trigger bot flows). Default: 10022.

variables.name: TS SSH Username
variables.description: ServerQuery username for SSH (optional, only for event-trigger flows).

variables.name: TS SSH Password
variables.description: ServerQuery password for SSH (optional, only for event-trigger flows). Stored encrypted.
